title: いきなりマーダーミステリー！　その3

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, our murder mystery group has
assembled to pin down the culprit once and for
all. Now, the last we heard was...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So, actually, I was with Grass from just after she
served dinner right up until we all gathered here.
But while we were together...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I caught a very brief glimpse of Sei walking along
holding something...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following Special Week's revelation, Seiun Sky
seemed like the most likely suspect. But in
response...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Spe's telling the truth. I was walking around the inn holding something.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Right. Last time, Sei admitted that Spe's
revelation was true. Tell us, Sei—do you have
some sort of scheme up your sleeve?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nope, there's no scheming going on here. I just
admitted the truth, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, it all right if I go ahead and
spill my secret now? It's a pretty important one,
y'know.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: An important secret? Let's hear it! Vamos!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So, I happened to get a look at Grass's phone.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And y'know what I saw? Plant-based poison in her
purchase history.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Que fuerte! Poison?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That means Grass was the one who had the
poison to begin with, and she spiked the meal.
But she knew bringing poisoned food directly
woulda been way too obvious.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Luckily for her, King just happened to leave the
room, and El had dropped by right before that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Grass figured she could frame El, so she went
back to King's room and switched the bowls...
How's that for a summary of events?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? So you're sayin' Grass is our main suspect?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? But Grass was...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. Before I forget. That sound of
something breaking was King dropping the bowl
after eating the poison.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I happened to be nearby, so I rushed over, and
that's when I found King.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I decided to run and tell everyone, but
I figured it'd be dangerous to leave the bowl on
the floor, so I swept it up and took it with me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That must be when Spe saw me booking it with
the broken bowl. Nothing suspicious after all,
right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So that's what you're going with, then? But you
have no proof that what you're saying is the truth,
correct?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Right, no evidence. Which means it's up to all of
you to make up your minds one way or another.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky grins, and with two suspects trying to
clear their name, a timer signals the end of phase
two.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gahhh! Sei and Grass both seem muy
suspechosas!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back over everything that's been revealed
so far. Who should I cast my vote for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the results in, Seiun Sky receives the most
votes and is deemed the culprit.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Darn it. Guess I couldn't pull the wool over
anyone's eyes, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's right, I'm the culprit. But this whole thing
was just an unfortunate series of events.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, I'd actually cleaned King's room during
the day, but I'd gone and left my broom behind.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I waited for King to leave her room so I could
sneak in and grab it, but I accidentally knocked it
over.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It smashed the original bowl of chawanmushi and
made a huge racket, so I rushed to the kitchen for
a replacement. I had no idea the food in the blue
bowl had been poisoned.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Your story about my having gone back to
the room to switch the bowls was quite plausible
indeed.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And you timed the revelation that I had been in
possession of the poison quite effectively too.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But things aren't always as they seem...
Ultimately, your explanation wasn't consistent
with Spe's statement about having been with me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's how you knew something was up...
Guess I've gotta do better next time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, excellent. I would love to play again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the truth comes to light and the
curtains close on the murder mystery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The results are in, but the vote is divided, so
Seiun Sky is off the hook.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So the game ends without us knowing who did it?
Maaan, what a bummer...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I mean, that's why they call it a murder mystery. The ambiguity's part of the suspense.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's lies were so convincing. We should
definitely do this again sometime.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! I didn't tell any lies!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'd very much like to deduce the identity of
the real liar next time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: GASP!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is it over?! It's finally over, right?! I thought I'd
never be able to breathe again...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Hey, King. Welcome back to the world of the
living.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Who was the real killer in the end? Perhaps only
Seiun Sky and Grass Wonder know the truth...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the results in, Grass Wonder receives the
most votes and is deemed the culprit.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Goodness me. Well...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, you've all been deceived... by Sei's
lies.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Lying, bluffing, whatever you'd like to call it. But I
am not the culprit.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! Really?! I have no idea what was true and
what was a lie!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, well, maybe Grass really isn't the true
killer...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...But that doesn't necessarily mean everything I
said was untrue. Fortune favors the bold, am I
right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm not sure precisely what you mean, but
you do have a way with words.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha! I suppose that's something we have in
common.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Who was the real killer in the end? Perhaps only
Seiun Sky and Grass Wonder know the truth...
